title: On Holding AG Analyst Ratings and Earnings Forecasts
text: On Holding AG is covered by 34 analysts with 25 analysts submitting revenue or earnings estimates. ONON's forecast earnings growth of 24.5% per year exceeds the savings rate and grows faster than US market growth of 16% per year. Recent analyst sentiment shows Telsey Advisory Group maintained an Outperform rating while lowering price target from $65 to $60 on March 25, 2026. On guided 2026 net sales to grow at least 23% at constant currency, lifting the 2023-2026 constant-currency CAGR to at least 30.5%. Multiple analysts view the company as a growth story with strong momentum in athletic wear and footwear, supported by effective brand partnerships and international expansion.
